name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine and mix it with the powdered sugar, peanut butter, and vanilla extract.
2. Roll the mixture out on a cookie sheet.
3. Sprinkle the chocolate chips over the top of the rolled-out candy.
4. Place the cookie sheet in an oven preheated to 250°F (120°C) and melt the chocolate chips.
5. Spread the melted chocolate evenly over the candy and let it cool completely.
6. Cut into squares. This recipe is similar to Reese's Peanut Butter Cups (may need refrigeration).
